a:r.a:t: representing the synergy of integrity and innovation.
play with the duality of nature & technology and light & dark.
Ranging from dark to light neutrals – the full palette highlights transition and energy.
bright yellow and purple are less used, but more impactful - small but significant.
CMYK: 5, 8, 0, 3 RGB: 227, 223, 235 HEX: E3DFEB NCS: S0510-R60B RAL: 300 90 05 Pantone: 664C
